race.description: Barbagallo Motoring Excellence Governors Cup Pce
race.comment: Topliner MAGNIFICENT STORM NZ (8) stretched his perfect record this campaign to four when he led and proved too good in the Bunbury Cup last start. Draws wide but has a phenomenal record at this circuit and distance, winning 20 of 28. He has proven that he can overcome tough draws before so looks the winner. HUGOTASTIC NZ (4) made it back-to-back placings when he finished a 1.4m second behind Magnificent Storm in the Bunbury Cup. Draws a few spots wider but he goes very well at this circuit and distance with three wins and two placings from six attempts. MIGHTY RONALDO (11) came from this row when third behind the top two selections in the Bunbury Cup. He is building nicely so can play a role again. TUALOU NZ (2) goes up in grade but draws well and came from wider to win at his latest appearance at this circuit and distance so include.
